title: Keybind CFG
description: A small mod to seperate your keybind settings from the others.
body:
This is a small creation for keybind manipulation make for modpack developers that can set their keybinds and make them unmodifiable via keybinds.json.

In keybinds.json you can set an admin mode that allows you to lock and set keybinds in game, so make sure to disable admin/devMode in the keybinds.json config.
